title: Trigram drill: the, ing, and, ion
text: the the the ing ing ing and and and ion ion ion the king is running the action and the meeting and the morning and the singing and the action

tips.text: These should feel like single chord-like motions

tips.target: the the the ing ing ing and and and ion ion ion the king is

tips.text: Speed test: type 'ing' 10 times — should take ~1.5 seconds

tips.target: running the action and the meeting and the morning and the singing and the action

character_tips.anna: Three-letter chunks are the next level. Burn them in until they're effortless.
character_tips.maxim: These trigrams appear in every paragraph. Drill = compound interest.
character_tips.knopych: TRIPLE COMBO! 🎯 Three keys, ONE motion!
character_tips.klavochka: Like dancing in threes, my sweetheart 🌷
